digest.en: Witkoff and Kushner are set to hold talks in Pakistan on Iran. Colombia and Venezuela are also engaging in key discussions following a post-Maduro visit. Malaysia has named a former High Court judge as its new anti-graft chief in a notable move.
digest.hi: ईरान और अमेरिका के बीच बढ़ते तनाव के बीच ब्रिक्स बैठक में इस मुद्दे पर चर्चा नहीं होगी। भारत के आतंक रोधी प्रयासों की UN ने सराहना की है। अमेरिकी युद्धपोत USS राफेल पेराल्टा ने ईरानी जहाज को रोका है।

articles.title: Witkoff and Kushner to Go to Pakistan for Talks on Iran
articles.summary: US envoys Witkoff and Kushner will visit Pakistan on Saturday for talks on Iran. Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi arrived in Islamabad on Friday, setting the stage for discussions. The two American envoys are expected to leave Saturday for Pakistan.

articles.title: Colombia, Venezuela hold key talks in post-Maduro visit
articles.summary: Colombian President Gustavo Petro visited Caracas, securing military cooperation with Venezuela to combat border mafias. This marks Petro's first visit since Nicolas Maduro's removal. Colombia and Venezuela announced military cooperation to combat border "mafias" during President Gustavo Petro's visit to Caracas.

articles.title: In unprecedented move, Malaysia names former High Court judge as new anti-graft chief
articles.summary: Abdul Halim Aman, a 69-year-old former High Court judge, will lead Malaysia's Anti-Corruption Commission from May 13. He succeeds 63-year-old Azam Baki. Abdul Halim Aman, 69, will lead the Malaysian Anti-Corruption Commission from May 13, succeeding Azam Baki, 63.

articles.title: Iran says no direct talks with U.S. in Islamabad planned
articles.summary: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi ruled out direct talks with the US during his visit to Pakistan. Islamabad will act as a mediator, with no face-to-face meetings planned. Iran has ruled out direct talks with the United States as Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi visits Pakistan.

articles.title: Iran, US To Hold 2nd Round Of Peace Talks In Pakistan As Delicate Ceasefire Holds
articles.summary: Iran and the US will hold a second round of peace talks in Pakistan. The previous round occurred on April 11-12, amid a delicate ceasefire. The previous round of talks was held on April 11-12.

articles.title: 31 sloths die in Florida before opening of attraction
articles.summary: Thirty-one sloths died in a Florida warehouse before an attraction opened. Authorities said many died due to poor conditions, while others arrived dead from South America. Many died due to conditions at a Florida warehouse where they'd been shipped, while others arrived from South America dead, authorities say.

articles.title: U.S. military strike on alleged drug boat kills 2 in eastern Pacific
articles.summary: A US military strike on a suspected drug-trafficking boat in the eastern Pacific killed two people. The Trump administration's campaign has killed at least 183 people since September. The Trump administration’s campaign of blowing up alleged drug-trafficking vessels in Latin American waters has persisted since early September and killed at least 183 people in total.

articles.title: US Preparation For King Charles Visit Goes Down Under With Australian Flag Error
articles.summary: US officials mistakenly displayed an Australian flag upside down during preparations for King Charles' visit. Charles is also the head of state for Australia, albeit in a largely ceremonial role.

articles.title: Israel escalates attacks in Gaza, killing 12 people
articles.summary: Israeli forces killed 12 Palestinians, including six police officers, in multiple attacks across Gaza. The attacks escalated tensions in the region. Israeli forces have killed 12 Palestinians, including six police officers, in multiple attacks across Gaza.

articles.title: Prince Harry Says Will 'Always Be Part Of Royal Family'
articles.summary: Prince Harry said he will "always be part of the royal family". He plans to remain a "working royal", carrying out official engagements as a senior family member. "Working royal" is a senior member of the royal family who carries out official engagements.

articles.title: Trump Spokeswoman Announces Maternity Leave, No Stand-In Named
articles.summary: White House spokeswoman Karoline Waltz announced maternity leave, but no temporary replacement was named. The White House did not confirm the duration of her leave. The White House has not confirmed for how long she will be out.

articles.title: Anthropic Says Google To Pump $40 Billion Into AI Startup
articles.summary: Google will invest $40 billion in AI startup Anthropic. Anthropic is among AI sector rivals spending heavily on computing infrastructure. Anthropic is among AI sector rivals spending tens of billions of dollars on computing infrastructure.

articles.title: Iran's foreign minister arrives in Pakistan, Trump expects offer satisfying US demands
articles.summary: Iranian Foreign Minister Hossein Amir-Abdollahian arrived in Pakistan. The White House announced special envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner will travel to Pakistan for talks. Iran says it has no plans to meet US officials, while the White House says special envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner will travel to Pakistan on Saturday (Apr 25) for talks.

articles.title: Crunch nuclear proliferation meeting at UN amid raging global wars
articles.summary: A nuclear proliferation meeting is underway at the UN. The meeting occurs amid ongoing global conflicts. Crunch nuclear proliferation meeting at UN amid raging global wars France 24.

articles.title: Businesses Spend Up To $4 Million To Cross Panama Canal Amid Hormuz Chokehold
articles.summary: Businesses are paying up to $4 million to cross the Panama Canal. The high fees are not due to congestion at the canal. The extra fees are becoming so high not because ships are piling up at the canal.

articles.title: What’s happening on day 57 as Trump dispatches negotiating team?
articles.summary: US envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner will travel to Pakistan for Iran peace talks, as Iranian FM Abbas Araghchi arrived in Islamabad. The US negotiating team's visit aims to revive stalled talks.

articles.title: US military kills two more people in strike on alleged drug boat in Pacific
articles.summary: The US military killed two people in a strike on a boat in the eastern Pacific, part of a campaign that has killed at least 178 people since September. The US claims the strikes target "narco-trafficking" operations.

articles.title: Witkoff, Kushner to head to new Iran peace talks in Pakistan, White House says
articles.summary: US envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner will travel to Pakistan for new Iran peace talks. The visit comes as Iranian FM Abbas Araghchi arrived in Islamabad, amid hopes for renewed talks.

articles.title: US Iran War News Live Updates: US envoys to go to Pakistan for peace talks but Iran says no direct
articles.summary: Tehran's foreign minister arrived in Islamabad for talks as US envoys prepared to travel. US Iran War News Live Updates: Tehran’s FM in Islamabad; US says envoys to travel for talks.

articles.title: US State Dept orders global warning about alleged AI thefts by DeepSeek, other Chinese firms
articles.summary: The US State Department issued a global warning about alleged AI thefts by Chinese firms, including DeepSeek. The warning aims to alert countries to potential security risks from these companies.

articles.title: US imposes sanctions on Chinese 'teapot' refinery for buying Iranian oil
articles.summary: The US imposed sanctions on Hengli Petrochemical for buying Iranian oil. The Treasury Department targeted Hengli Petrochemical (Dalian) Refinery, which it said is one of Iran's largest customers of crude oil and petroleum products.

articles.title: ब्रिक्स में नहीं उठेगा ईरान-अमेरिका-इजरायल की जंग का मुद्दा! नहीं बन पा रही आपसी सहमति
articles.summary: ब्रिक्स की बैठक में ईरान-अमेरिका-इजरायल की जंग का मुद्दा नहीं उठेगा. सदस्य देशों में आपसी सहमति नहीं बन पा रही है. यह मुद्दा फिलहाल टाला गया है. ब्रिक्स में नहीं उठेगा ईरान-अमेरिका-इजरायल की जंग का मुद्दा!

articles.title: UN ने की भारत के आतंक रोधी प्रयासों की सराहना, सिबी जार्ज की हुई अहम बैठक
articles.summary: संयुक्त राष्ट्र ने भारत के आतंक रोधी प्रयासों की सराहना की. सिबी जार्ज के साथ एक अहम बैठक हुई. भारत के प्रयासों को सकारात्मक बताया गया. UN ने की भारत के आतंक रोधी प्रयासों की सराहना, सिबी जार्ज की हुई अहम बैठक Jagran।

articles.summary: रूस के विदेश मंत्री सर्गेई ने कहा कि पश्चिम ने यूक्रेन की आड़ में रूस के खिलाफ युद्ध छेड़ा है. उन्होंने यूरोप पर भी निशाना साधा. 'यूक्रेन की आड़ में पश्चिम ने रूस के खिलाफ छेड़ा युद्ध', विदेश मंत्री सर्गेई ने यूरोप पर साधा निशाना।

articles.summary: अमेरिका ने पश्चिम एशिया में बड़ी सेना उतारी है. सेंट्रल कमांड की पोस्ट ने तीन विमान वाहक, सैनिक, और लड़ाकू जेट तैनात किए हैं. यह तैनाती ईरान के साथ तनाव के बीच हुई है.

articles.title: आईटी पेशेवरों को लग सकता है बड़ा झटका: तीन साल के लिए H-1B वीजा पर रोक की तैयारी, प्रस्ताव पेश
articles.summary: अमेरिकी कांग्रेस में एक प्रस्ताव पेश किया गया है जो तीन साल के लिए H-1B वीजा पर रोक लगाने की तैयारी कर रहा है। यह प्रस्ताव आईटी पेशेवरों को बड़ा झटका दे सकता है। एच-1बी वीजा पर रोक से आईटी उद्योग पर असर पड़ सकता है।

articles.summary: राष्ट्रीय स्वयंसेवक संघ के महास secretary दत्तात्रेय होसबाले ने कहा कि प्रधानमंत्री मोदी संघ के सबसे अच्छे प्रतिनिधि हैं। उन्होंने कहा कि 2047 में भारत वैश्विक नेतृत्व में होगा। होसबाले ने मोदी की नेतृत्व क्षमता की प्रशंसा की।

articles.summary: अमेरिकी वित्त मंत्रालय के एक अधिकारी ने कहा कि प्रतिबंध विरोधी ताकतों को वित्तीय तंत्र से बाहर रखने में एक अहम उपकरण हैं। उन्होंने कहा कि प्रतिबंधों से अमेरिकी वित्तीय प्रणाली की सुरक्षा होती है। अधिकारी ने प्रतिबंधों की प्रभावशीलता पर जोर दिया।

articles.title: लेबनान के साथ युद्धविराम के बावजूद इस्राइली सेना और हिजबुल्ला के बीच हमले जारी, कई शहरों पर हुए हमले
articles.summary: लेबनान में इस्राइली सेना और हिजबुल्ला के बीच हमले जारी हैं। कई शहरों पर हमले हुए हैं। यह हमले लेबनान के साथ युद्धविराम के बावजूद हो रहे हैं। लेबनान के साथ युद्धविराम के बावजूद इस्राइली सेना और हिजबुल्ला के बीच हमले जारी, कई शहरों पर हुए हमले।

articles.summary: ईरान के विदेश मंत्री इस्लामाबाद पहुँचे हैं। अमेरिका के साथ बातचीत पर संशय बरकरार है। व्हाइट हाउस ने कहा है कि अमेरिकी प्रतिनिधिमंडल इस्लामाबाद जाएगा। व्हाइट हाउस ने कहा है कि ईरान के साथ शांति वार्ता के लिए अमेरिकी प्रतिनिधिमंडल इस्लामाबाद जाएगा.
